principles.name: Additional PCI DSS Requirements for Multi-Tenant Service Providers

sections.name: Multi-tenant service providers protect and separate all customer environments and data
sections.description: Multi-tenant service providers protect and separate all customer environments and data

sections.name: Multi-tenant service providers facilitate logging and incident response for all customers
sections.description: Multi-tenant service providers facilitate logging and incident response for all customers

principles.name: Additional PCI DSS Requirements for Entities Using SSL/Early TLS for Card-Present POS POI Terminal Connections

sections.name: POI terminals using SSL and/or early TLS are confirmed as not susceptible to known SSL/TLS exploits.
sections.description: POI terminals using SSL and/or early TLS are confirmed as not susceptible to known SSL/TLS exploits.

principles.name: Install and Maintain Network Security Controls (NSCs)

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for installing and maintaining network security controls are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for installing and maintaining network security controls are defined and understood

sections.name: Network security controls (NSCs) are configured and maintained
sections.description: Network security controls (NSCs) are configured and maintained

sections.name: Network access to and from the cardholder data environment is restricted
sections.description: Network access to and from the cardholder data environment is restricted

sections.name: Network connections between trusted and untrusted networks are controlled
sections.description: Network connections between trusted and untrusted networks are controlled

sections.name: Risks to the CDE from computing devices that are able to connect to both untrusted networks and the CDE are mitigated
sections.description: Risks to the CDE from computing devices that are able to connect to both untrusted networks and the CDE are mitigated

principles.name: Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for applying secure configurations to all system components are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for applying secure configurations to all system components are defined and understood

sections.name: System components are configured and managed securely
sections.description: System components are configured and managed securely

sections.name: Wireless environments are configured and managed securely
sections.description: Wireless environments are configured and managed securely

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for protecting stored account data are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for protecting stored account data are defined and understood

sections.name: Storage of account data is kept to a minimum
sections.description: Storage of account data is kept to a minimum

sections.name: Sensitive authentication data (SAD) is not stored after authorization
sections.description: Sensitive authentication data (SAD) is not stored after authorization

sections.name: Access to displays of full PAN and ability to copy cardholder data are restricted
sections.description: Access to displays of full PAN and ability to copy cardholder data are restricted

sections.name: Primary account number (PAN) is secured wherever it is stored
sections.description: Primary account number (PAN) is secured wherever it is stored

sections.name: Cryptographic keys used to protect stored account data are secured
sections.description: Cryptographic keys used to protect stored account data are secured

sections.name: Where cryptography is used to protect stored account data, key management processes and procedures covering all aspects of the key lifecycle are defined and implemented
sections.description: Where cryptography is used to protect stored account data, key management processes and procedures covering all aspects of the key lifecycle are defined and implemented

principles.name: Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission Over Open, Public Networks

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for protecting cardholder data with strong cryptography during transmission over open, public networks are defined and documented
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for protecting cardholder data with strong cryptography during transmission over open, public networks are defined and documented

sections.name: PAN is protected with strong cryptography during transmission
sections.description: PAN is protected with strong cryptography during transmission

principles.name: Protect All Systems and Networks from Malicious Software

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for protecting all systems and networks from malicious software are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for protecting all systems and networks from malicious software are defined and understood

sections.name: Malicious software (malware) is prevented, or detected and addressed
sections.description: Malicious software (malware) is prevented, or detected and addressed

sections.name: Anti-malware mechanisms and processes are active, maintained, and monitored
sections.description: Anti-malware mechanisms and processes are active, maintained, and monitored

sections.name: Anti-phishing mechanisms protect users against phishing attacks
sections.description: Anti-phishing mechanisms protect users against phishing attacks

principles.name: Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for developing and maintaining secure systems and software are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for developing and maintaining secure systems and software are defined and understood

sections.name: Bespoke and custom software are developed securely
sections.description: Bespoke and custom software are developed securely

sections.name: Security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed
sections.description: Security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed

sections.name: Public-facing web applications are protected against attacks
sections.description: Public-facing web applications are protected against attacks

sections.name: Changes to all system components are managed securely
sections.description: Changes to all system components are managed securely

principles.name: Restrict Access to System Components and Cardholder Data by Business Need to Know

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for restricting access to system components and cardholder data by business need to know are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for restricting access to system components and cardholder data by business need to know are defined and understood

sections.name: Access to system components and data is appropriately defined and assigned
sections.description: Access to system components and data is appropriately defined and assigned

sections.name: Access to system components and data is managed via an access control system(s)
sections.description: Access to system components and data is managed via an access control system(s)

principles.name: Identify Users and Authenticate Access to System Components

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for identifying users and authenticating access to system components are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for identifying users and authenticating access to system components are defined and understood

sections.name: User identification and related accounts for users and administrators are strictly managed throughout an account’s lifecycle
sections.description: User identification and related accounts for users and administrators are strictly managed throughout an account’s lifecycle

sections.name: Strong authentication for users and administrators is established and managed
sections.description: Strong authentication for users and administrators is established and managed

sections.name: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is implemented to secure access into the CDE
sections.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is implemented to secure access into the CDE

sections.name: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) systems are configured to prevent misuse
sections.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) systems are configured to prevent misuse

sections.name: Use of application and system accounts and associated authentication factors is strictly managed
sections.description: Use of application and system accounts and associated authentication factors is strictly managed

principles.name: Restrict Physical Access to Cardholder Data

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for restricting physical access to cardholder data are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for restricting physical access to cardholder data are defined and understood

sections.name: Physical access controls manage entry into facilities and systems containing cardholder data
sections.description: Physical access controls manage entry into facilities and systems containing cardholder data

sections.name: Physical access for personnel and visitors is authorized and managed
sections.description: Physical access for personnel and visitors is authorized and managed

sections.name: Media with cardholder data is securely stored, accessed, distributed, and destroyed
sections.description: Media with cardholder data is securely stored, accessed, distributed, and destroyed

sections.name: Point of interaction (POI) devices are protected from tampering and unauthorized substitution
sections.description: Point of interaction (POI) devices are protected from tampering and unauthorized substitution

principles.name: Log and Monitor All Access to System Components and Cardholder Data

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for logging and monitoring all access to system components and cardholder data are defined and documented
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for logging and monitoring all access to system components and cardholder data are defined and documented

sections.name: Audit logs are implemented to support the detection of anomalies and suspicious activity, and the forensic analysis of events
sections.description: Audit logs are implemented to support the detection of anomalies and suspicious activity, and the forensic analysis of events

sections.name: Audit logs are protected from destruction and unauthorized modifications
sections.description: Audit logs are protected from destruction and unauthorized modifications

sections.name: Audit logs are reviewed to identify anomalies or suspicious activity
sections.description: Audit logs are reviewed to identify anomalies or suspicious activity

sections.name: Audit log history is retained and available for analysis
sections.description: Audit log history is retained and available for analysis

sections.name: Time-synchronization mechanisms support consistent time settings across all systems
sections.description: Time-synchronization mechanisms support consistent time settings across all systems

sections.name: Failures of critical security control systems are detected, reported, and responded to promptly
sections.description: Failures of critical security control systems are detected, reported, and responded to promptly

principles.name: Test Security of Systems and Networks Regularly

sections.name: Processes and mechanisms for regularly testing security of systems and networks are defined and understood
sections.description: Processes and mechanisms for regularly testing security of systems and networks are defined and understood

sections.name: Wireless access points are identified and monitored, and unauthorized wireless access points are addressed
sections.description: Wireless access points are identified and monitored, and unauthorized wireless access points are addressed

sections.name: External and internal vulnerabilities are regularly identified, prioritized, and addressed
sections.description: External and internal vulnerabilities are regularly identified, prioritized, and addressed

sections.name: External and internal penetration testing is regularly performed, and exploitable vulnerabilities and security weaknesses are corrected
sections.description: External and internal penetration testing is regularly performed, and exploitable vulnerabilities and security weaknesses are corrected

sections.name: Network intrusions and unexpected file changes are detected and responded to
sections.description: Network intrusions and unexpected file changes are detected and responded to

sections.name: Unauthorized changes on payment pages are detected and responded to
sections.description: Unauthorized changes on payment pages are detected and responded to

principles.name: Support Information Security with Organizational Policies and Programs

sections.name: A comprehensive information security policy that governs and provides direction for protection of the entity’s information assets is known and current
sections.description: A comprehensive information security policy that governs and provides direction for protection of the entity’s information assets is known and current

sections.name: Acceptable use policies for end-user technologies are defined and implemented
sections.description: Acceptable use policies for end-user technologies are defined and implemented

sections.name: Risks to the cardholder data environment are formally identified, evaluated, and managed
sections.description: Risks to the cardholder data environment are formally identified, evaluated, and managed

sections.name: PCI DSS compliance is managed
sections.description: PCI DSS compliance is managed

sections.name: PCI DSS scope is documented and validated
sections.description: PCI DSS scope is documented and validated

sections.name: Security awareness education is an ongoing activity
sections.description: Security awareness education is an ongoing activity

sections.name: Personnel are screened to reduce risks from insider threats
sections.description: Personnel are screened to reduce risks from insider threats

sections.name: Risk to information assets associated with third-party service provider (TPSP) relationships is managed
sections.description: Risk to information assets associated with third-party service provider (TPSP) relationships is managed

sections.name: Third-party service providers (TPSPs) support their customers’ PCI DSS compliance
sections.description: Third-party service providers (TPSPs) support their customers’ PCI DSS compliance

sections.name: Suspected and confirmed security incidents that could impact the CDE are responded to immediately
sections.description: Suspected and confirmed security incidents that could impact the CDE are responded to immediately
